Reguliacinis PPI su funkcijom
```{r}
library(pacman)
p_load(dplyr, igraph, ggraph, tidygraph, STRINGdb, clusterProfiler, org.Hs.eg.db)
```
```{r}
gtf <- import("~/NB_lncRNA/input/gencode.v49.annotation.gtf")
gtf_lnc <- gtf[gtf$gene_type == "lncRNA"]
gtf_pc <- gtf[gtf$gene_type == "protein_coding"]
```
```{r}
gene_map <- data.frame(
  gene_id   = mcols(gtf_pc)$gene_id,
  gene_name = mcols(gtf_pc)$gene_name)

lnc_map <- data.frame(
  gene_id   = mcols(gtf_lnc)$gene_id,
  gene_name = mcols(gtf_lnc)$gene_name)

map_all <- rbind(gene_map, lnc_map)
map_all <- map_all[!duplicated(map_all$gene_id), ]
res$gene_symbol <- map_all$gene_name[match(rownames(res), map_all$gene_id)]

convert_names <- function(mat, map){
  new_names <- map$gene_name[match(rownames(mat), map$gene_id)]
  new_names[is.na(new_names)] <- rownames(mat)[is.na(new_names)]
  rownames(mat) <- new_names
  return(mat)
}

lnc_mat_top <- convert_names(lnc_mat_top, map_all)
pc_mat_top  <- convert_names(pc_mat_top, map_all)
```

Pasirenkami reikiami duomenys (matrica su atfiltruotais duomenimis)

Iš turimų duomenų atsirenkame statistiškai reikšmingai pakitusias lncRNA ir mRNA 
(be log2FoldChange parametro, nes tiriamos sąveikos, kurios gali turėti reikšmės)
Ištraukiamos reikšmingos koreliacijos: 1% geriausių
```{r}
cor_matrix <- cor(t(lnc_mat_top), t(pc_mat_top), method="pearson")

p_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow=nrow(lnc_mat_top), ncol=nrow(pc_mat_top))

for(i in 1:nrow(lnc_mat_top)){
  for(j in 1:nrow(pc_mat_top)){
    p_matrix[i,j] <- cor.test(lnc_mat_top[i,], pc_mat_top[j,], method="pearson")$p.value
  }
}

rownames(cor_matrix) <- rownames(lnc_mat_top)
colnames(cor_matrix) <- rownames(pc_mat_top)
```

```{r}
cor_cutoff <- 0.95
p_cutoff <- 0.05

sig_pairs <- which(abs(cor_matrix) > cor_cutoff & p_matrix < p_cutoff, arr.ind=TRUE)

lnc_mrna_edges <- data.frame(
  lncRNA = rownames(cor_matrix)[sig_pairs[,1]],
  mRNA   = colnames(cor_matrix)[sig_pairs[,2]],
  cor    = cor_matrix[sig_pairs])
```

```{r}
lnc_nodes <- data.frame(
  gene = rownames(lnc_mat_top),
  type = "lncRNA")

mrna_nodes <- data.frame(
  gene = rownames(pc_mat_top),
  type = "mRNA")

nodes <- rbind(lnc_nodes, mrna_nodes)
```


```{r}
ppi_genes <- rownames(pc_mat_top)

library(STRINGdb)

string_db <- STRINGdb$new(
  version="11.5",
  species=9606,   # change if not human
  score_threshold=400)

gene_df <- data.frame(gene=ppi_genes)
mapped <- string_db$map(gene_df, "gene", removeUnmappedRows=TRUE)
ppi <- string_db$get_interactions(mapped$STRING_id)

```
```{r}
id_map <- mapped[,c("STRING_id","gene")]

ppi_edges <- merge(ppi, id_map, by.x="from", by.y="STRING_id")
ppi_edges <- merge(ppi_edges, id_map, by.x="to", by.y="STRING_id")

ppi_edges <- data.frame(
  geneA = ppi_edges$gene.x,
  geneB = ppi_edges$gene.y,
  score = ppi_edges$combined_score)

```


```{r}
lnc_mrna_edges <- as.data.frame(lnc_mrna_edges)

edges <- data.frame(
  from = lnc_mrna_edges[, "lncRNA"],
  to   = lnc_mrna_edges[, "mRNA"],
  weight = as.numeric(lnc_mrna_edges[, "cor"]),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


g <- graph_from_data_frame(d = edges, vertices = nodes, directed = FALSE)
saveRDS(g, "~/NB_lncRNA/output/code/BioInsights/graphgraph_object_K12.RDS")

```

```{r}



```


```{r}

```


# 
```{r}

```
```{r}

```

```{r}

```


```{r}

```


```{r}

```


# 

```{r}

```


```{r}

```
